summary: Release-blocking fail-closed contract is not met: a non-dry-run invalid gate authorization reaches gh pr view before gate_not_ready is enforced.
inspection_summary: The authorization calculation is fail-closed, but enforcement occurs after external fetch and GitHub PR inspection in the real execution path. This contradicts AC-7, AC-8, and S-001.
judgment_delta: The resolver is conservative, but the actual non-dry-run call order enforces its result too late.

findings.finding: Invalid gate authorization can execute gh pr view before gate_not_ready.
findings.required_resolution: Return before external GitHub operations and add a non-dry-run regression fixture.

findings.finding: Current HEAD has focused but not uninterrupted full-suite evidence.
findings.required_resolution: Record current-HEAD suite evidence after the ordering fix.
